backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend with user profiles, machine CRUD operations, blob storage, and role-based access control via admin/user permissions.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that converts legacy List-based `auditLogs` and `contacts` fields to arrays for the updated actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing UI changes, new hooks, and component updates across the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'Machine Cleaning Tracker' and mounts the React app via `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that detects login/logout via Internet Identity, checks localStorage per-principal to conditionally show `AddContactDetailsPage` or `Dashboard`.
Dialog modal for registering a new machine with form validation, calling the `useAddMachine` mutation and resetting state on close.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: AlertDialog confirmation component that calls `useDeleteMachine` mutation with a loading spinner and silently handles errors.
frontend/src/components/DueTodayAlertBan: Dismissible urgent alert banner that lists machines with cleanings due within 24 hours, featuring animated flash and pulse effects.
frontend/src/components/EditMachineModal: A dialog modal for editing an existing machine's details, pre-populating form fields from the machine prop and submitting updates via the useUpdateMachine hook.
frontend/src/components/ForgotPasswordDi: A dialog that accepts a phone number input and simulates sending a password reset link, showing a success state after submission.
frontend/src/components/MachineCard.tsx: Displays a machine's details (name, number, part, dates, status) in a card with actions for editing, deleting, rescheduling, and marking the part as done.
frontend/src/components/MachineFormField: Reusable form field set for machine data (name, machine number, part type, last cleaned date, next due date) with validation export.
frontend/src/components/OverdueAlertBann: Displays a dismissible alert banner listing all machines whose cleaning status is overdue.
frontend/src/components/PhoneLoginForm.t: A phone-number and password login form with validation, loading state simulation, and a success confirmation view.
frontend/src/components/RescheduleDateMo: A modal dialog component that allows users to set a new next-due cleaning date for a machine, using the useRescheduleNextDue mutation and date utility helpers.
frontend/src/components/SessionLogsPanel: A card component that displays a scrollable list of audit log entries (login/logout events) with user principal and timestamp, fetched via useGetAuditLogs.
frontend/src/components/StatsBar.tsx: A responsive stats bar that displays counts of machines grouped by status (ok, due-soon, due-today, overdue) with icons and conditional pulse animations.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A styled badge component that shows a machine's cleaning status (ok, due-soon, due-today, overdue) with color coding, a status dot, and animated effects for urgent states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching machines, audit logs, and user profiles, as well as mutations for adding, updating, and rescheduling machines and managing contacts.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Barlow fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including status colors and custom keyframe animations.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with React Query and Internet Identity providers and mounts it to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AddContactDetailsPage: Onboarding page that collects and validates a user's full name, phone, and email, then saves them via the `useSaveContact` hook with an option to skip.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page that displays all machines with status banners, a stats bar, and controls for adding machines, refreshing data, and logging in/out via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts: Utility functions for converting between IC nanosecond timestamps and JS Dates, computing machine status (ok/due-soon/due-today/overdue), and formatting dates and principal IDs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, custom color tokens (using oklch CSS variables), fonts (Barlow), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, with plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (schema v1.0.0, version 9) for a Machine Cleaning Tracker app, listing existing completed features and pending fix requests (AR-1 through AR-8+) covering backend Motoko logic, frontend React/Query issues, auth flow, and date utilities.
